title: Ana Badour and Matthew Peters Recognized as Change Agents in Law at 2019 Lexpert Zenith Awards
content:
## Ana Badour and Matthew Peters Recognized as Change Agents in Law at 2019 Lexpert Zenith Awards
Toronto, June 19, 2019 — McCarthy Tétrault congratulates partners Ana Badour and Matthew Peters, recipients of the 2019 Lexpert Zenith Awards, Celebrating Change Agents in Law. These awards recognize their leadership as innovators, driving change at the firm and in the legal industry in the pursuit of optimal service to clients.
“Ana and Matthew are leading the revolution to rethink and reinvent the way McCarthy Tétrault leverages technology to deliver the best experience to our clients,” said Dave Leonard, CEO McCarthy Tétrault. “Both individuals have had an incredible impact at our firm and I am thrilled to see them recognized as champions of change.”
Ana is a partner in the Toronto Financial Services Group and co-leader of the firm’s Fintech Group. She brings in-depth industry and legal knowledge to clients, shaping smart solutions for financial institutions, ensuring they remain compliant and competitive and is widely recognized as a leader in Fintech, blockchain technology, cryptocurrencies and payment innovation.
As McCarthy Tétrault’s National Innovation Leader Matthew leads the firm’s cutting edge initiatives around innovation, new lines of business, client service, pricing and service delivery, as well as the firm’s client satisfaction measurement program. His unique role in the industry continues to be a catalyst in helping the firm respond to evolving client needs.

#### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
